title: Smoky Chicken Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy chicken wrap filled with smoky Peruvian chicken, crunchy veggies, and creamy avocado. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.

ingredients.name: Smoky Peruvian Chicken
ingredients.notes: Cooked according to the package instructions.

instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Add the shredded chicken to the pan and heat until warmed through.
Warm the tortilla wrap in the microwave for 20-30 seconds or in the pan for a few seconds on each side.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the sour cream on the tortilla, followed by the shredded chicken, lettuce, tomato, avocado, red onion, and cilantro.
Drizzle the salsa over the top of the wrap.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
